title: steironema hybridum
intro: Steironema hybridum, also known as wood sorrel or sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, often used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and combat urinary tract infections. Wood sorrel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits.
